summary.zh: 约肯·林特在意大利大奖赛排位赛中遭遇致命事故身亡，凭借此前积累的分数，赛季结束后被追授为世界冠军，成为 F1 历史上唯一一位追授冠军。
summary.en: Jochen Rindt died in a practice crash at the Italian Grand Prix; his points tally from earlier races still stood, and he was posthumously awarded the championship at season's end - the only posthumous champion in F1 history.

content.zh: 约肯·林特在意大利大奖赛排位赛中遭遇致命事故身亡，凭借此前积累的分数，赛季结束后被追授为世界冠军，成为 F1 历史上唯一一位追授冠军。
content.en: Jochen Rindt died in a practice crash at the Italian Grand Prix; his points tally from earlier races still stood, and he was posthumously awarded the championship at season's end - the only posthumous champion in F1 history.
